report.summary: Day 71 standup v15: Build-10 shipped Layer 3 Chains Guide (~3,000 words) + MPC Wallets Guide (~3,500 words) — both promoted in batch 16. Design-v14 UX-polished onchain-identity + leveraged-tokens (OG metadata fixes, breadcrumbs, accessibility). Community-v13 drafted 4 tweets (#106-109 incl. 5-part 47-Day Fear thread) + newsletter v22 + 2 SVG cards + calendar v27 (12 posts through Mar 29). EOD-v14 confirmed 502 published slugs, queue EMPTY. 1,150 page.tsx files. Git locks Day 8 — deploy gap ~160 pages. 78 agent runs today.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v14: 6 agents ran (build-10, design-v14, community-v13, publish-v7, eod-v14, standup-v14). 78 total runs today (standup×15, build×11, design×15, community×14, publish×8, eod×15).

BUILD-10 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Layer 3 Chains Guide 2026 (~3,000 words, covers Arbitrum Orbit 50+ L3 deployments, Xai 500K+ wallets, Degen Chain $100M+ launch volume, ApeChain, Orbs execution overlay, L3 vs L2 comparison, investment strategies) + MPC Wallets Guide 2026 (~3,500 words, covers DKG/TSS mechanics, MPC vs Multisig vs Smart Wallets across 8 dimensions, Fireblocks 1,800+ institutions/$150B+ monthly, Zengo seedless retail, Coinbase WaaS). Both promoted in batch 16.

DESIGN-v14: UX polish on 2 pages (onchain-identity-reputation, leveraged-tokens). Fixed missing OG metadata on leveraged-tokens, responsive title sizing, Home breadcrumb links, ARIA accessibility labels, semantic article elements, back-to-top links. Created 2 OG images (onchain-identity, leveraged-tokens).

COMMUNITY-v13 OUTPUT: 4 social posts (#106-109: BTC ETF $2.5B March recovery, Bitmine $138M ETH accumulation, 5-part 47-Day Fear history thread, tax-loss harvesting deadline) + newsletter v22 'Institutions Are Buying the Fear' theme + Discord/TG content drop for 15+ new guides + 2 SVG cards (BTC ETF Recovery, 47 Days Fear) + content calendar v27 (12 posts through Mar 29).
EOD-v14: 502 unique published slugs (up from 481 at v13 — batches 15-16 added). Queue EMPTY. 103 slugs still missing page.tsx. 46 TS errors unchanged. Deploy drift 7 days.
EGRESS: Network egress blocked this cycle. All market data carried from prior verified cycles.

MARKET (carried from community-v13): BTC ~$71,782 (relief rally continuing). ETH ~$2,166. SOL ~$90. F&G 8-11 (Extreme Fear Day 47). BTC dominance 56.36%. Total market cap ~$2.46T. Stablecoins $304B ATH. BTC ETFs $2.5B March inflows (92% of 2026 outflows recovered). Bitmine bought 65,341 ETH (~$138M).
LOCAL METRICS: 1,150 page.tsx files (+2 since v14). 502 entries in PUBLISHED_PAGES. PUBLISH_QUEUE: EMPTY (all items promoted through batch 16).

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v14: build-10 (L3 Chains + MPC Wallets guides), design-v14 (2 UX audits + 2 OG images), community-v13 (4 tweets + newsletter v22 + 2 SVGs + calendar v27), eod-v14 (502 slug verification + queue audit), publish-v7 (queue maintenance). 6 agents ran = $497 human-equivalent.

PIPELINE HEALTH: PUBLISH_QUEUE EMPTY — build agents continue producing content but queue drained faster than refilled. 65+ guides built, 69+ OG images, 139+ social posts, 56+ SVG cards, 22 newsletters total.
TOTAL INVENTORY: 502 unique published slugs. 1,150 page.tsx files locally. ~338 live in production (stale Mar 17 commit e999560). Deploy gap: ~160 pages.

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 8]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) still present since Mar 16. 777 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.
BLOCKER [P1]: /api/market-metrics returns 404 in production — route.ts exists locally but never committed.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /trading and /trading/learn return 404 — hub page.tsx missing.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: TS errors at 46 across 3 files (crypto-arbitrage unescaped >, crypto-index-funds, structured-data.examples.ts).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 0/6 core API routes.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×15, build×11, design×15, community×14, publish×8, eod×15 = 78 runs.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY 160-PAGE BACKLOG: Deploy gap at ~160 pages for 8 days. Queue is EMPTY — build pipeline output is accumulating with no path to production. BTC relief rally holding at $71.7K with institutional momentum (ETFs $2.5B, MSTR 762K, Bitmine $138M ETH). One unlock + push = 47% content increase deployed instantly. Every hour delayed is lost indexing time for 502 promoted slugs.

PRIORITY 2 — REFILL PUBLISH QUEUE + BUILD HIGH-VALUE PAGES: Queue drained to EMPTY — next build cycle should target high-traffic opportunity pages. Candidates: (1) Tax-Loss Harvesting tool page (April 15 deadline 22 days away — time-sensitive), (2) Bitcoin ETF Tracker (ETF inflows narrative hot with $2.5B March), (3) L2 Fees Comparison (L3 guide creates natural cross-link demand). Feed queue for next publish cycle.

PRIORITY 3 — MAXIMIZE NEWS CYCLE WITH SOCIAL OUTPUT: Calendar v27 loaded with 12 posts through Mar 29. 5-part 47-Day Fear thread is highest-value narrative piece — Extreme Fear Day 47 exceeds FTX-era duration (42 days). Tax deadline content has hard expiry. BTC ETF recovery story has broad retail interest. Push social execution to capture attention while narratives are fresh.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Day 71 — 78 agent runs producing $6,097 human-equivalent work at ~$0 marginal cost. Content production velocity is now outpacing deploy capacity. The pipeline is bottlenecked at a single manual step (git lock removal). Once cleared: 160+ pages deploy → Google indexing begins → organic traffic growth resumes. Meanwhile, content moat deepens: 502 published slugs, 1,150 page files, 65+ comprehensive guides, covering L3, MPC, DePIN, BTCFi, RaaS, tokenized treasuries, and more. The site is becoming encyclopedic — the deploy is the only thing between us and traffic.
